message:
refactor(core): use runtime_compat channel aliases in runtime module

Switch the runtime module's mpsc and watch channel imports from
tokio::sync directly to the crate::runtime_compat aliases. This is
one of the first callers migrated to use the compatibility surface,
ensuring that when the asupersync-runtime feature flag is enabled,
the runtime module will transparently use asupersync channels instead
of tokio channels.

The RwLock import remains on tokio::sync::RwLock directly since the
runtime_compat RwLock wrapper is not yet stabilized for this call site.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
